name: Draw Together: Drawing Game for Two
tagline: A real-time drawing game for two people. Create a private room, invite a friend, and draw together on the same canvas.
description: Draw Together: Drawing Game for Two lets two players join a private room and draw on the same canvas in real time. It is designed for simple shared drawing sessions with room-based multiplayer.
features: Create a private room and invite one other player
Draw together on the same shared canvas in real time
Use nicknames and room presence to coordinate the session

name: Sample Cafe POS
tagline: A simple offline-first point of sale for small cafes.
description: Sample Cafe POS helps small cafe owners manage orders, receipts, and daily sales from an Android phone. This placeholder app keeps the Nosami Apps showcase populated while the real app catalog is prepared.
